input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.2.7.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.2.7.1
            TITLE: presentations will be evaluated on content, organization, visual aids, delivery and the team’s

            CONTENT:
            rule S.2.7.1: Presentations will be evaluated on content, organization, visual aids, delivery and the team’s
S.2.7.1 Presentations will be evaluated on content, organization, visual aids, delivery and the team’s 
response to the judges’ questions.

final_answer: Presentations will be evaluated on content, organization, visual aids, delivery and the team’s response to the judges’ questions.
